commit_scope: Release JSON parsing from compiler/bootstrap and normal stdlib callers: ontology bindings now materialize from kernel-native bp coordinates, JsonCodec owns route/corpus parse-emission, and parse-json remains only in seedbank compost paths.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Compiler/bootstrap no longer parses ontology JSON at runtime, normal JSON parse/emit callers use the BML JsonCodec surface, and old parse-json/json-emit code is confined to seedbank compost paths.
test_flows: Run source and binary validate.sh bands for JsonCodec parse/emit, JSON grammar attribution, JSON meaning ingestion, source compiler runtime, multi-dialect source compile, i18n, channel-query JSON projection, and ontology parity.
Scan for parse-json/json-emit/json-scan/json-unescape and verify remaining references are seedbank compost or audit text.
